name: github_list_org_copilot_space_collaborators
description: List collaborators for an organization Copilot Space (GET /orgs/{org}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}/collaborators). Returns collaborators array. Classic tokens need read:org. See [List collaborators for an organization Copilot Space](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/collaborators?apiVe
